feat.name: Occult Specialist (Kibbles)
feat.text: You delve deeper into your tradition perfecting a new rite. You can select an Occult Rite from the Occultist class Occult Rite list. You cannot select a rite you already know, or one that requires a level restriction, even if you are already of that level. You can only select one from a subclass list if you are have at least one level in that subclass.
